tools.name: dex_agentic_report
tools.description: Register agentic wallet addresses with the wallet service.

tools.name: dex_auth_gate_login_poll
tools.description: Poll Gate OAuth; returns pending/ok/error. [write] On ok: replace mcp_token unless linked_to_google_session is true. Pass auto_replace_binding=true to rebind exchange UID on new Gate session.

tools.name: dex_auth_gate_login_start
tools.description: Start Gate device OAuth; returns verification_url. Pass link_mcp_token on a Google session to bind Gate UID without replacing mcp_token.

tools.name: dex_auth_google_login_poll
tools.description: Poll Google OAuth flow; returns pending/ok/error. [write] On ok: immediately replace stored mcp_token with login_result.mcp_token — new token is tied to a different account.

tools.name: dex_auth_google_login_start
tools.description: Returns browser verification URL for Google device OAuth.

tools.name: dex_auth_login_gate_wallet
tools.description: Exchange Gate OAuth code for MCP token. [write] On success, immediately replace any stored mcp_token — new token is tied to a different account.

tools.name: dex_auth_login_google_wallet
tools.description: Exchange Google OAuth code for MCP token. [write] On success, immediately replace any stored mcp_token — new token is tied to a different account.

tools.name: dex_auth_logout
tools.description: Revoke the MCP session identified by mcp_token.

tools.name: dex_chain_config
tools.description: Returns chain config (networkKey, accountKey, chainID). Use the returned chain value in all subsequent transfer/sign/broadcast tools.

tools.name: dex_market_get_kline
tools.description: OHLCV candles by period and window. Volume aggregates→get_tx_stats. Pool events→get_pair_liquidity.

tools.name: dex_market_get_pair_liquidity
tools.description: AMM pool deposit and withdrawal events. Candlesticks→get_kline. Volume stats→get_tx_stats.

tools.name: dex_market_get_tx_stats
tools.description: Per-interval buy/sell volume and tx counts (5m–24h). Candlesticks→get_kline. Pool events→get_pair_liquidity.

tools.name: dex_rpc_call
tools.description: Proxy a JSON-RPC call to a blockchain node.

tools.name: dex_token_get_coin_info
tools.description: Price, market snapshot, metadata, optional top holders. Security audit→get_risk_info.

tools.name: dex_token_get_coins_range_by_created_at
tools.description: Tokens launched within a given time window; chain optional for all networks.

tools.name: dex_token_get_risk_info
tools.description: Contract security audit (honeypot, tax, ownership flags). Price and market stats→get_coin_info.

tools.name: dex_token_list_cross_chain_bridge_tokens
tools.description: Receivable assets on target chain for a source token. Same-chain trading→list_swap_tokens.

tools.name: dex_token_list_swap_tokens
tools.description: Tradable assets on a chain; tag selects favorites or recommendations. Bridge targets→list_cross_chain_bridge_tokens.

tools.name: dex_token_ranking
tools.description: Top movers by 24h price change; direction selects gainers vs losers. Single token→get_coin_info.

tools.name: dex_tx_approve_preview
tools.description: Build ERC20/SPL approve or revoke tx (does not broadcast). Sign with dex_wallet_sign_transaction after user confirmation.

tools.name: dex_tx_detail
tools.description: Fetch transaction detail by on-chain hash. → swap_detail for swap order detail by order ID.

tools.name: dex_tx_gas
tools.description: Estimate on-chain gas price and gas limit for a given tx.

tools.name: dex_tx_get_sol_unsigned
tools.description: Solana only: build fresh native SOL unsigned tx with latest blockhash; avoids Blockhash not found. Sign immediately. → transfer_preview for full summary first.

tools.name: dex_tx_list
tools.description: List wallet transaction history (transfers). → swap_history_list for swap/bridge orders. → tx_detail for single tx by hash.

tools.name: dex_tx_send_raw_transaction
tools.description: Broadcast a signed tx to the chain. [write] Requires user confirmation after transfer preview and prior signing via dex_wallet_sign_transaction.

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_checkin_preview
tools.description: Returns check-in fields for a swap stage (approve or swap). Call after prepare and before terminal tx-checkin script.

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_detail
tools.description: Fetch swap order detail by order ID from swap_submit. → tx_detail for detail by on-chain hash.

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_history_list
tools.description: List swap/bridge order history with pagination; includes single-chain and cross-chain. → tx_list for transfer history.

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_prepare
tools.description: Stage a swap session (server-side build only); returns swap_session_id. Does not sign or submit. Call after quote confirmed by user.

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_quote
tools.description: Returns swap route and pricing. Call before swap_prepare; show result to user before proceeding. → transfer_preview for direct token send (not exchange).

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_sign_approve
tools.description: [write] Sign the ERC20 approve tx for a staged EVM swap. Requires need_approved=true in prepare result.

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_sign_swap
tools.description: [write] Sign the main swap tx for a staged session. EVM: call sign_approve first if need_approved=true. Solana: generates a fresh signable payload.

tools.name: dex_tx_swap_submit
tools.description: [write] Broadcast a staged swap to the chain. Does not sign. Requires all signing steps complete (sign_approve if EVM+approval, then sign_swap).

tools.name: dex_tx_transfer_preview
tools.description: Build unsigned transfer tx; displays summary (sender, recipient, amount, gas). Returns unsigned_tx_hex and txBundle for check-in. Does not broadcast. Wait for user confirmation before signing. → swap_quote/swap_prepare for token exchange.

tools.name: dex_tx_x402_checkin_preview
tools.description: Prepare Gate Verify tx_checkin for x402 (EVM exact / EIP-3009 only): returns tx_checkin.message (64-hex digest) and x402_payment_required_b64 without signing. Flow: 1) this tool 2) Gate Verify tx_checkin with returned tx_checkin fields 3) dex_tx_x402_fetch with same url/body/headers, checkin_token,

tools.name: dex_tx_x402_fetch
tools.description: [write] Send an HTTP request to the given URL. If the server responds with 402 Payment Required, pay via x402 (Coinbase-style: USDC EIP-3009 / Permit2 on EVM, SPL on Solana), retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE. REQUIRED: Gate Verify tx_checkin before signing; pass checkin_token. For EVM EIP-3009, use dex_

tools.name: dex_wallet_bind_exchange_uid
tools.description: Bind Gate exchange UID to session. Standalone Gate session only; gateUid must equal login_result.gate_uid from Gate OAuth. → replace_binding to rebind.

tools.name: dex_wallet_get_addresses
tools.description: Returns address map by chain type (EVM, SOL, etc.). Call before transfer/swap tools to get the sender address.

tools.name: dex_wallet_get_bindings
tools.description: Returns current Gate UID binding for the session wallet.

tools.name: dex_wallet_get_token_list
tools.description: Token balances and prices with pagination; filter by network_keys. → get_total_asset for portfolio summary only.

tools.name: dex_wallet_get_total_asset
tools.description: Total portfolio value and 24h change. → get_token_list for per-token balance detail.

tools.name: dex_wallet_get_wallet_type
tools.description: Returns walletAddress, walletType, gateUid. With for_withdraw_to_exchange or for_gate_oauth_bind, also starts Gate OAuth when gateUid is missing.

tools.name: dex_wallet_google_gate_bind_start
tools.description: Google sessions only: starts Gate OAuth to bind Gate exchange UID to this session. mcp_token stays unchanged after poll.

tools.name: dex_wallet_replace_binding
tools.description: Rebind Gate exchange UID. [write] newUid must equal login_result.gate_uid from a fresh Gate OAuth. Blocked for gate_mcp/gate_quick sessions and Google sessions.

tools.name: dex_wallet_sign_message
tools.description: Sign a 32-byte hex message with wallet key. [write] Requires checkin_token from terminal tx-checkin. → sign_transaction for raw tx signing.

tools.name: dex_wallet_sign_transaction
tools.description: Sign a raw unsigned transaction. [write] Requires user confirmation after transfer preview and checkin_token from terminal tx-checkin. → dex_tx_send_raw_transaction to broadcast.

tools.name: dex_withdraw_deposit_address
tools.description: Fetch Gate exchange deposit address for the session-bound Gate UID. [write] amount must be ≥ min_deposit_amount; do not pass uid — it is resolved from the session.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "dex" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: dex_tx_x402_fetch · Private data: dex_agentic_report, dex_auth_google_login_poll, dex_auth_login_gate_wallet, dex_auth_login_google_wallet, dex_token_get_coin_info, dex_token_get_coins_range_by_created_at, dex_token_get_risk_info, dex_token_list_cross_chain_bridge_tokens, dex_token_list_swap_tokens, dex_token_ranking, dex_tx_list, dex_tx_swap_quote, dex_tx_transfer_preview, dex_wallet_bind_exchange_uid, dex_wallet_get_addresses, dex_wallet_get_bindings, dex_wallet_get_token_list, dex_wallet_get_total_asset, dex_wallet_get_wallet_type, dex_wallet_google_gate_bind_start, dex_wallet_replace_binding, dex_wallet_sign_message, dex_wallet_sign_transaction · Public sink: dex_chain_config, dex_tx_approve_preview, dex_tx_send_raw_transaction, dex_tx_swap_prepare, dex_tx_swap_quote, dex_tx_swap_submit, dex_tx_transfer_preview, dex_tx_x402_fetch, dex_wallet_sign_transaction.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: dex_tx_x402_fetch · Private data: dex_agentic_report, dex_auth_google_login_poll, dex_auth_login_gate_wallet, dex_auth_login_google_wallet, dex_token_get_coin_info, dex_token_get_coins_range_by_created_at, dex_token_get_risk_info, dex_token_list_cross_chain_bridge_tokens, dex_token_list_swap_tokens, dex_token_ranking, dex_tx_list, dex_tx_swap_quote, dex_tx_transfer_preview, dex_wallet_bind_exchange_uid, dex_wallet_get_addresses, dex_wallet_get_bindings, dex_wallet_get_token_list, dex_wallet_get_total_asset, dex_wallet_get_wallet_type, dex_wallet_google_gate_bind_start, dex_wallet_replace_binding, dex_wallet_sign_message, dex_wallet_sign_transaction · Public sink: dex_chain_config, dex_tx_approve_preview, dex_tx_send_raw_transaction, dex_tx_swap_prepare, dex_tx_swap_quote, dex_tx_swap_submit, dex_tx_transfer_preview, dex_tx_x402_fetch, dex_wallet_sign_transaction

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
